content.query:
SELECT			PO.ID AS								[PO Number]
,				PO.VENDOR_ID AS							[Supplier Number]
,				V.NAME AS								[Supplier Name]
,				PO.ORDER_DATE AS						[PO Place Date]
,				POL.LINE_NO								[Line Number]
,				POL.PART_ID								[Item Number]
,               IM.[Item Description]
,               IM.Brand
,               IM.[Sub-Brand]
,				POL.ORDER_QTY							[Order Qty]
,				POL.TOTAL_RECEIVED_QTY					[Received Qty]
,				POL.LAST_RECEIVED_DATE					[Last Receipt Date]
,				POL.UNIT_PRICE							[Unit Cost]
,				POL.ORDER_QTY*POL.UNIT_PRICE			[Total Order Cost]
,				POL.TOTAL_RECEIVED_QTY*POL.UNIT_PRICE	[Total Received Cost]
,				POL.ORIG_COUNTRY_ID						[Country]
FROM			ECM.PURCHASE_ORDER PO
JOIN			ECM.PURC_ORDER_LINE POL ON PO.ID = POL.PURC_ORDER_ID
JOIN			ECM.VENDOR V on PO.VENDOR_ID = V.ID
LEFT JOIN       BI_ItemMaster IM on POL.PART_ID = IM.[Item Number]
WHERE			POL.LAST_RECEIVED_DATE BETWEEN '2022-01-01' AND '2022-12-31'
AND				POL.PART_ID IS NOT NULL

UNION ALL

SELECT			'Syspro Company A' as ERP
,				POH.PurchaseOrder as [PO Number]
,				POH.Supplier as [Supplier Number]
,				AP.SupplierName as [Supplier Name]
,				POH.OrderEntryDate as [PO Place Date]
,				POD.Line as [Line Number]
,				POD.MStockCode as [Item Number]
,               IM.[Item Description]
,               IM.Brand
,               IM.[Sub-Brand]
,				MOrderQty as [Order Qty]
,				MReceivedQty as [Received Qty]
,				MLastReceiptDat as [Last Received Date]
,				MPrice as [Unit Cost]
,				MPrice*MOrderQty as [Total Order Cost]
,				MPrice*MReceivedQty as [Total Received Cost]
FROM			SCA.PorMasterHdr POH
JOIN			SCA.PorMasterDetail POD on POH.PurchaseOrder = POD.PurchaseOrder
JOIN			SCA.ApSupplier AP on POH.Supplier = AP.Supplier
LEFT JOIN       BI_ItemMaster IM on POD.MStockCode = IM.[Item Number]
WHERE           MLastReceiptDat BETWEEN '2022-01-01' AND '2022-12-31'

UNION ALL

SELECT			'Syspro Company L' as ERP
,				POH.PurchaseOrder as [PO Number]
,				POH.Supplier as [Supplier Number]
,				AP.SupplierName as [Supplier Name]
,				POH.OrderEntryDate as [PO Place Date]
,				POD.Line as [Line Number]
,				POD.MStockCode as [Item Number]
,               IM.[Item Description]
,               IM.Brand
,               IM.[Sub-Brand]
,				MOrderQty as [Order Qty]
,				MReceivedQty as [Received Qty]
,				MLastReceiptDat as [Last Received Date]
,				MPrice as [Unit Cost]
,				MPrice*MOrderQty as [Total Order Cost]
,				MPrice*MReceivedQty as [Total Received Cost]
FROM			SCL.PorMasterHdr POH
JOIN			SCL.PorMasterDetail POD on POH.PurchaseOrder = POD.PurchaseOrder
JOIN			SCL.ApSupplier AP on POH.Supplier = AP.Supplier
LEFT JOIN       BI_ItemMaster IM on POD.MStockCode = IM.[Item Number]
WHERE           MLastReceiptDat BETWEEN '2022-01-01' AND '2022-12-31'

UNION ALL

SELECT			'Syspro Company G' as ERP
,				POH.PurchaseOrder as [PO Number]
,				POH.Supplier as [Supplier Number]
,				AP.SupplierName as [Supplier Name]
,				POH.OrderEntryDate as [PO Place Date]
,				POD.Line as [Line Number]
,				POD.MStockCode as [Item Number]
,               IM.[Item Description]
,               IM.Brand
,               IM.[Sub-Brand]
,				MOrderQty as [Order Qty]
,				MReceivedQty as [Received Qty]
,				MLastReceiptDat as [Last Received Date]
,				MPrice as [Unit Cost]
,				MPrice*MOrderQty as [Total Order Cost]
,				MPrice*MReceivedQty as [Total Received Cost]
FROM			SCG.PorMasterHdr POH
JOIN			SCG.PorMasterDetail POD on POH.PurchaseOrder = POD.PurchaseOrder
JOIN			SCG.ApSupplier AP on POH.Supplier = AP.Supplier
LEFT JOIN       BI_ItemMaster IM on POD.MStockCode = IM.[Item Number]
WHERE           MLastReceiptDat BETWEEN '2022-01-01' AND '2022-12-31'

union all

SELECT          'Apprise' as ERP
,               [po-num]
,               po.[supplier-key]
,               [supplier-name]
,               [po-date]
,               [line-num]
,               [product-code]
,               IM.[Item Description]
,               IM.Brand
,               IM.[Sub-Brand]
,               [qty-ordered]
,               [qty-received]
,               [receipt-complete-date]
,               [unit-cost]
,               [unit-cost]*[qty-ordered]
,               [unit-cost]*[qty-received]
FROM            APR.[po-trailer] po
LEFT JOIN       BI_ItemMaster IM on po.[product-code] = IM.[Item Number]
join            APR.suppname sp on po.[supplier-key] = sp.[supplier-key]
where           [receipt-complete-date] BETWEEN '2022-01-01' AND '2022-12-31'
